player.description: Sky Ronin player ship — top-down dragon-winged battle kite, dark red and black lacquered hull, golden dragon wings, teal spirit energy core. Anime style.

enemy.description: Shinobi clan enemy sky barge — dark triangular war vessel, purple and black lacquered wood, crimson paper lanterns, shuriken-shaped hull fins. Anime style.

boss.description: Demon Yokai boss fortress — giant airborne armored castle shaped like oni demon face, massive curved iron horns, green lightning energy cannons. Anime style.

stardust.description: Spirit Orb collectible — translucent jade-green and golden soul orb, swirling kanji inside, radiating ethereal light, spirit energy wisps. Collectible for Sky Ronin game.

crystal.description: Spirit Orb bonus crystal — reuses spirit orb asset for crystal drops.

playerBullet.description: Player spirit arrow bullet — vertical teal ki energy arrow with ofuda charm glow, pointing upward. Sky Ronin player projectile.

enemyBullet.description: Enemy cursed spirit orb bullet — round purple-black orb with dark lightning and red demonic fire wisps. Sky Ronin enemy projectile.

space.description: Feudal Japan dusk sky background — indigo and coral sky, ukiyo-e woodblock print style clouds, floating temple ruins, cherry blossom petals. Vertically tileable.
